Templates › GST Tax Invoice Template

🧾 GST Tax Invoice Template

IRD-compliant GST tax invoice template for registered NZ tradies — includes all required fields for a valid tax invoice.

How to use: Enter your GST number and invoice details, then download as PDF. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
TAX INVOICE
Invoice #: INV-001
Date: 2026-01-01
Due: 2026-01-20
From
Your Business Name
123 Trade Street, Auckland
021 000 0000
GST No: 123-456-789
IRD No: 123-456-789
Bill To
Client / Company Name
Client Address
Client GST No (if applicable)
Job / Services
Job at: 123 Site Address
DescriptionQtyRate ($)Amount (excl. GST)
Labour — [trade/hours]8 hrs95.00760.00
Materials1 lot450.00450.00
Subtotal (excl. GST)$1,210.00
GST (15%)$181.50
TOTAL (incl. GST)$1,391.50
Payment Details
Bank: [Your Bank] | Account: [XX-XXXX-XXXXXXX-XX] | Ref: INV-001
This is a tax invoice for GST purposes. GST registered under the Goods and Services Tax Act 1985. | NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

🧾 GST Tax Invoice Template

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Enter your GST number and invoice details, then download as PDF.
